description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker that can be triggered manually with an optional version input. In a single ubuntu-22.04 job, check out the repository and use the openzim/docker-publish-action to build and push a Docker image named openzim/zim-tools to ghcr.io. Configure the action to use a specific Dockerfile, set the image tag based on the GitHub tag or manual input, and authenticate with GHCR using secrets.
